calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-09-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.

Daniel Bornstein, Esq. for the Plaintiff: Bay Property Group, and as a Witness for the plaintiff, was placed under oath and direct examined.
No appearance by Defendants Wallace Harris and Minday Cain.

After hearing the testimony and considering of the evidence presented, good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendants for Judgment as follows:

Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 376 ellis St., #101, San Francisco, CA 94102.
The lease is forfeited.
Past-due rent and per diem damages in total of $1,400.00
Costs - per memo of cost.
Total - $1,400.00

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-09-2012 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-05-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Bay Property Group is present. Represented by Daniel Borenstein.
Attorney Daniel Borenstein appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Wallace Harris is present.
Attorney Paul Brehend representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Marte Bassi, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 504A, for settlement discussions.

This case did NOT settle. The trial date of JAN-09-2012 remains on calendar.
